ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISBLANK(Quotes__c), TEXT(Order_type__c) != 'ZAR2', TEXT(Order_type__c) != 'ZMX2', TEXT(Order_type__c) != 'ZMX8', TEXT(Order_type__c) != 'ZMX1', RecordType.Name = 'Model B', NOT(SAP_Order__c) ), AND( TEXT(Order_type__c) = 'ZMX8',$Profile.Name != 'Mexico Rainbow Agro Logistics' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can only create return order/service order
